## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Zapier for content and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zapier is focusing on driving pipeline and demand generation for their new enterprise sales motion](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a strategy sprint and execution services for organic growth, content, and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Potential areas for collaboration include newsletter development, LLM content optimization, and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Next steps involve Kaveh sharing Zapier's priority areas and scheduling a follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

## Topics

### Zapier's Current Focus and Challenges

  - [Shifting focus from self-serve SMB to enterprise sales motion](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [9-12 month sales cycle requires keeping prospects engaged](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Conducting AMAs and hackathons to demonstrate product value](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Challenge: Getting prospects to see multiple use cases beyond initial problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Strategy sprint: 8-week engagement to create artifacts and execute initial projects](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Persona and industry-specific content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Interactive experiences (e.g., use case pages, vendor catalogs)](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Newsletter development and distribution (e.g., Beehive)](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [LLM content optimization for better visibility in AI-powered search](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Newsletter development for AI transformation leadership](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [LLM content optimization to improve Zapier's visibility in AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Sales enablement through industry and account-specific artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Programmatic content refreshes and CTA optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

### Engagement Process and Next Steps

  - [Strategy sprint: 8 weeks, $30K one-time fee](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Follow-up growth execution based on identified work streams](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Kaveh to email 3-5 priority areas for Zapier in the next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaveh to send 3-5 priority areas for Zapier, ranked by importance](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a shared Slack channel and add Kaveh](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Tuesday at 10 AM Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [GrowthX to send calendar invite for the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Kaveh to consider inviting relevant team members to the follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/_vcNsRFvExosNscLx-T3s5zs_vLWzHML?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
